runtime: Antigravity CLI / Gemini 3.5 Flash selected through /model
rules: Read this manifest before loading detailed SQL.
Run required queries in order; evaluate each optional query's applicability_trigger before loading or executing it.
Retrieve current first-party documentation with any available read-only documentation or web capability; MCP is optional.
Use the bq/gcloud CLI with its active or impersonated gcloud principal for live data and issue only read-only operations.
Construct current bq syntax from the official CLI reference and bind every query to the explicit query project, BigQuery location, and GoogleSQL mode without destination writes.
A failed or unavailable query becomes an explicit evidence gap; never fabricate or silently omit it.

Assign every query exactly one terminal status: PASS, FALLBACK, BLOCKED, or NOT APPLICABLE. An absent optional trigger is NOT APPLICABLE; a present trigger with a missing execution prerequisite is BLOCKED; zero rows after valid execution is PASS evidence of absence.
GAP is a documentation-check status, not a query terminal status.
Use one inclusive analysis_start_ts and exclusive analysis_end_ts for comparable workload evidence; default to the previous 30 complete UTC days and label specialized horizons separately.
Evaluate dependencies before numeric ordering: run required 0.1, 0.2, 0.2a, and 0.5 before optional 0.3 and 0.4.
Load only the relevant Query section from resources/finops_agent.md.

reports.purpose: reservation, assignment, commitment, and compute-billing baseline
project-scoped workload concentration; legacy filename retained for compatibility and never interpreted as a cross-project ranking
query, contention, queue, and recommendation evidence
reconciled strategy, evidence quality, actions, and review results

queries.applicability_trigger: Query 0.5 observes positive-slot jobs with a non-null reservation_id.
execution_prerequisites: Reservation metadata is accessible in the reservation administration project.
queries.fallback_contract: Run the named SQL section only when current reservation configuration fields are unavailable; retain analyzed-project scope and record reduced configuration coverage.

queries.applicability_trigger: Query 0.3 is PASS or FALLBACK and observes a positive reservation baseline.
execution_prerequisites: The analyzed workload-project scope and time-aligned reservation capacity evidence are recorded.

queries.applicability_trigger: Contention or query-pressure analysis is requested.
execution_prerequisites: Use the primary when query_info.performance_insights is supported; otherwise use the documented runnable-units fallback.
queries.fallback_contract: Aggregate period_estimated_runnable_units from JOBS_TIMELINE_BY_PROJECT as a project/time pressure proxy; never attribute a job-level root cause.

queries.applicability_trigger: General BigQuery cost-recommendation analysis is requested.
execution_prerequisites: The regional RECOMMENDATIONS_BY_PROJECT view is accessible.

queries.applicability_trigger: Query performance diagnostics are included in the requested audit.
execution_prerequisites: Project-wide JOBS metadata and query_info.performance_insights fields are accessible.

queries.applicability_trigger: BI Engine use is detected or BI Engine diagnostics are explicitly requested.
execution_prerequisites: Project-wide JOBS metadata and bi_engine_statistics fields are accessible.

queries.applicability_trigger: Dataset partition/cluster triage is explicitly requested or one or more approved dataset IDs are supplied.
execution_prerequisites: At least one approved dataset_id is supplied.

queries.applicability_trigger: Storage Write API activity is suspected or observed, or the user explicitly requests Storage Write API analysis.
execution_prerequisites: Storage Write API metadata is accessible, or the authorized Cloud Monitoring fallback has equivalent documented scope and units.
queries.fallback_contract: Use read-only Cloud Monitoring only when authorized and official metric documentation establishes equivalent scope and units; it cannot prove legacy insertAll usage.

execution_prerequisites: TABLES and TABLE_STORAGE_BY_PROJECT metadata are accessible.

queries.applicability_trigger: Storage billing-model sensitivity is explicitly requested.
execution_prerequisites: All four dated location-specific storage prices are supplied.
A nonnegative user-provided minimum_monthly_variance is supplied.
